reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio ubicada estratégicamente en la ruta 12, pero presenta muchas falencias estructurales y en la atención del personal. Siempre esta llena de gente, pero eso no les preocupa a los que atienden alli, se toman todo el tiempo del mundo para despachar y generan un verdadero caos, ya que mucha gente para allí para cargar combustible. Otro temas son los baños, una mugre y encima en los baños de mujeres hay que hacer cola de mas de 50mts para ingresar, evidentemente la gente de YPF o del Automóvil Club Argentino no se tomaron nunca el trabajo de controlar esta estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station strategically located on Route 12, but it has many structural deficiencies and poor customer service. It's always packed, but that doesn't seem to bother the staff; they take forever to serve customers, creating absolute chaos, since so many people stop there to fill up. Another issue is the restrooms—they're filthy, and to top it off, you have to wait in line for over 50 meters to get into the women's restroom. Clearly, YPF or the Argentine Automobile Club have never bothered to inspect this station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bDdDS21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre no tienen débito ni crédito , pase dos veces en enero y en abril y en las dos oportunidades me dijeron lo mismo ! No entiendo cómo el acá no interviene dado que no cumple con los mínimos estándares para funcionar !

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster! They don't accept debit or credit cards. I went twice, once in January and once in April, and both times they told me the same thing! I don't understand why the authorities aren't intervening, given that it doesn't meet the minimum standards to operate!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdy02Y1RREAE
